what_makes_it_hard: decorative numeral brand; decimal ABV in small caps
flash glare; ornate red script; tiny combined ABV/proof/volume line
brand printed vertically; handwritten label; dim photo
dark bar lighting; EU export units (70 cl)
clear backlit bottle; volume/ABV in tiny base text
blurry tasting-room phone photo; should flag legibility
ornate Victorian frame; micro text on border (750mL confirmed by zooming; ABV unverifiable so unscored)
